SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 5 JUDGE: JOHN J. CONWAY CLERK: M.MELVIN REPORTER:D.DAVENPORT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF: REBECA MENDOZA; CHALINA GRAHAM, DEFENDANT PRO PER PRESENT. STIPULATED JUDGMENT REACHED AND STATED FOR THE RECORD: DEFENDANT CURRENTLY OWES $1,033.00; SHE HAS AGREED TO PAY $515.00 PRIOR TO FRIDAY, 7/17/98; DEFENDANT FURTHER AGREES TO PAY AN ADDITIONAL ONE HALF OF HER MONTHLY RENT ($109.00 CURRENT RENT PLUS $54.00 = $163.00) WHICH WILL BE APPLIED TOWARD THE BALANCE OF THE BACK RENT UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $518.00 IS PAID IN FULL; THE CASE WILL BE DIMISSED AT THAT TIME. FINAL PAYMENT WILL BE IN APPROX 10 MONTHS. ANY DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF BACK RENT WILL RESULT IN A DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED. DEFENDANT IS TO GO TO THE MANAGER TO MAKE PAYMENT AND AT THAT TIME, SIGN THE STIPULATION. TRIAL DATE IS VACATED. DEFENDANT UNDERSTANDS TERMS OF STIPULATION. PREMISES ARE LOCATED AT 158 DAKOTA ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, CHALINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 158 DAKOTA ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94107 $1,977.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,977.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
